title: [FIRRTL] Zero-width Index into MultibitMuxOp Crashes IMCP

features.name: zero_width_index_into_array
features.description: Code should include an array indexing operation where the index is a zero-width type (0 bits)

features.name: zero_width_mux_selector
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer operation where the selector has zero width (0 bits)

features.name: array_index_dynamic_zero_width
features.description: Code should include dynamic array indexing where the index expression resolves to zero width
